parameters.query: SELECT id FROM schedules WHERE school_name = '{{$json["schoolName"]}}' AND class_name = '{{$json["className"]}}' AND subject = '{{$json["subject"]}}' AND day_of_week = '{{$json["dayOfWeek"]}}' AND start_time = '{{$json["startTime"]}}' LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO schedules (school_name, class_name, subject, teacher_email, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, meeting_link, notes, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{$json["schoolName"]}}', '{{$json["className"]}}', '{{$json["subject"]}}', '{{$json["teacherEmail"]}}', '{{$json["dayOfWeek"]}}', '{{$json["startTime"]}}', '{{$json["endTime"]}}', '{{$json["meetingLink"] || ''}}', '{{$json["notes"] || ''}}', '{{$json["createdAt"]}}', '{{$json["updatedAt"]}}') RETURNING id;
